specFidelityNotes: Issue #424 / scope-alignment / grill lock: wire A-25 + A-31–A-39 only into Fujiwa production-read polling. Diff adds AnalyticsResource (date-window + pagination), GET-only allowlist paths/patterns, sync_analytics + run_fujiwa_poll_cycle hook (shared with ADR-021 manual refresh), tiktok_sync_state endpoint keys, and contract tests from contract-collection. LIVE A-26–A-29 remain reference-tier (path constants + allowlist rejection; no poll/resources/ETL). A-30/A-35 skipped. Analytics ETL deferred (handoff unused). RateLimiter module untouched. No intent gaps, contradicting creep, or wrong-vs-intent findings.

smells.name: Duplicated Code
smells.hunk: sync_analytics SKU list+detail loop and product list+detail loop share the same acquire → fetch → watermark → per-id detail acquire shape.

convention_notes.standard: polling/MODULE.md + tiktok/MODULE.md — public API / resource inventory
convention_notes.note: MODULE docs updated for sync_analytics, analytics allowlist, and AnalyticsResource; matches existing resource + worker documentation pattern.
New analytics sync-state keys registered on TikTokSyncStateRepo _ENDPOINT_STATE_KEYS rather than ad-hoc persistence.
Uses snake_case per backend Python convention; code-quality camelCase does not apply to this layer.
